Strategic Investment Term Sheet — between Xingzhou Advanced Optics Co., Ltd. (the Issuer) and Jinhai CloudWare Technology Co., Ltd. (the Investor).
Parties: Issuer USCC: XAO‑FAKE‑0000‑TEST18; Investor USCC: JCW‑XYZ‑1234‑INVALID; both PRC‑incorporated limited companies.
Listing/Status: The Issuer is an A‑share company listed on the Haicheng Stock Exchange (HCSE) Main Board; its 2023 annual report and a 2024 Q1 operations update were publicly disclosed on the HCSE issuer bulletin on 2024‑03‑30 and 2024‑04‑28.
Transaction: Proposed private placement of onshore ordinary A shares to the Investor, with pricing to be determined per HCSE Main Board rules and final registration with the National Securities and Futures Office (NSFO).
Use of Proceeds: General working capital and R&D under the already‑announced OptiCore 3.0 program and expansion of a publicly disclosed assembly line in Xingzhou New District; no proceeds will be used for acquisitions requiring separate shareholder approval.
Conditions Precedent: Issuer board and shareholder approvals, HCSE review and NSFO registration, antimonopoly notification if threshold is met, and compliance with PRC PIPL, CSL, and DSL.
Regulatory Filings & Timing: The Issuer will (i) convene a shareholders’ meeting within 30 days of board approval; (ii) make public announcements in accordance with HCSE Listing Rules within two trading days of each resolution; (iii) submit NSFO filing within 10 working days after shareholder approval.
Personal Information & Data: No collection of minors’ (<14) personal information; employee data processed on a minimum‑necessary basis with consent and purpose notice, and any HR file transfers follow PIPL and internal retention schedules; cross‑border transfers are not contemplated, and if later required, standard contracts and (if applicable) CDSC security assessment will be completed before export.
Employment Workflows: Background checks limited to lawful, public sources; resident IDs will not be stored except where legally required and in masked form (example placeholder: Resident ID ****110000‑19**‑****‑123X).
Public/Non‑Issuer Information: References to supplier delivery slippages and logistics constraints are based on third‑party industry bulletins and the Issuer’s 2024‑Q1 public update; Investor operational changes unrelated to the placement are outside the Issuer’s disclosure scope.
Disclosure History: The Issuer publicly filed a strategic framework announcement on 2024‑02‑10 and a general press release summarizing potential cooperation; media Q&A transcripts are available on the HCSE issuer bulletin and the Issuer’s IR page.
Insider Information Control (intentional positive): As of 2026‑06‑05, the Issuer’s specific board resolution for this private placement has not been published on HCSE; the Parties acknowledge this is inside information under PRC Securities Law and will observe an insider trading blackout until the Issuer’s 临时公告 is posted within two trading days.
Selective Disclosure Controls: No investor meetings will discuss non‑public performance metrics; all external communications will route through role mailboxes (ir@xao.example.cn; media@jcw.example.cn) and the public hotline (400‑123‑FAKE), and draft disclosures will be synchronized with HCSE‑mandated templates.
Effect & Governing Law: This term sheet is non‑binding (except confidentiality and exclusivity for 30 days) and terminates if NSFO registration is not obtained by 2026‑12‑31; governed by PRC law with disputes submitted to the Haicheng Arbitration Center.
